# Version 3.118.0
> **Skia m118 preview line** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.118.0-preview)
> **Superseded by [3.119.0](3.119.0.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.119.0.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.118.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.118.0 previewed the Skia m117/m118 bump alongside a broad refresh of the bundled native dependencies. Preview 2 also added Metal APIs to GRBackendRenderTarget on every platform and untangled the .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor hosting story. This line was never released as stable — everything here rolled up into 3.119.0.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia bumped through milestone 117 and 118** — Two upstream engine bumps land the m117 and m118 baselines for the v3.118 preview line. ([#3047](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3047), [#3048](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3048))
- **Native dependencies refreshed** — Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.1, libexpat to 2.6.4, libjpeg-turbo to 2.1.5.1+commits and FreeType to 2.13.3+ to pick up upstream fixes. ([#3052](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3052), [#3056](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3056), [#3060](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3060), [#3061](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3061))

## API Surface

- **Metal APIs on GRBackendRenderTarget across all platforms** — Exposes the Metal-backed `GRBackendRenderTarget` constructors on every Apple TFM so Metal render targets can be created uniformly from iOS, tvOS, macOS and Mac Catalyst code. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))

## Bug Fixes

- **ASP.NET Blazor on .NET 9 works again** — Fixes the WASM import path so SkiaSharp loads correctly from Blazor apps hosted under a base path, and moves the workaround into the SkiaSharp WASM assets themselves. ([#3064](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3064), [#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082), [#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088), [#3092](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3092))
- **Windows SDK version is pinned explicitly** — Uses `<WindowsSdkPackageVersion>` so the Windows SDK version resolves deterministically across consuming projects. ([#3085](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3085))

## Platform

- **Android NDK bumped to r27c with 16 KB page alignment** — Rebuilds the Android natives on NDK r27c so SkiaSharp keeps loading on Android 15+ devices that use 16 KB memory pages. ([#3099](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3099))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) | Added the Metal `GRBackendRenderTarget` overloads across every Apple platform ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070)) |

## Preview 2 (December 5, 2024)

Preview 2 stacked the second engine bump (m118), rolled the native dependencies (HarfBuzz, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo, FreeType) and delivered the Metal `GRBackendRenderTarget` APIs plus the .NET 9 Blazor hosting fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.1.2...v3.118.0-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (November 6, 2024)

Preview 1 opened the line with the Skia m117 baseline bump and the version rev to 3.118.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.116.1...v3.118.0-preview.1.2)
